evals.name: Detect outdated Android targetSdk as blocker
evals.prompt: Check Android configuration for Play Store

expected_issues.message: targetSdk 33 is below the required 35 for new apps and updates (since Aug 2025)
expected_issues.fix: Update targetSdk to 35 in android/app/build.gradle

evals.notes: Should also recommend updating compileSdk to match

evals.name: Detect targetSdk 34 as blocker (post Aug 2025)

expected_issues.message: targetSdk 34 is below the required 35 — Aug 2025 deadline has passed for new apps and updates
expected_issues.fix: Update targetSdk to 35 in android/app/build.gradle

evals.notes: Should not treat this as just a warning — it is a hard blocker post-deadline

evals.name: Detect compileSdk lower than targetSdk

expected_issues.message: compileSdk 34 is lower than targetSdk 35 — may cause build failures
expected_issues.fix: Update compileSdk to 35 or higher to match targetSdk

expected_pass: targetSdk 35 itself should pass the target-sdk check

evals.name: Detect APK-only build configuration
evals.prompt: Check if this app is ready for Play Store submission

files..github/workflows/release.yml:
name: Release
on: push
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - run: flutter build apk --release
      - name: Upload to Play Store
        run: fastlane supply --apk build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-release.apk

expected_issues.message: Building APK instead of AAB — Google Play requires Android App Bundle (AAB) for new apps
expected_issues.fix: Replace 'flutter build apk --release' with 'flutter build appbundle --release'

expected_issues.message: Fastlane configured to upload APK instead of AAB
expected_issues.fix: Replace '--apk ...app-release.apk' with '--aab ...app-release.aab'

evals.name: Detect restricted SMS/Call Log permissions

files.android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    package="com.example.app">
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_SMS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.SEND_SMS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_CALL_LOG" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.CAMERA" />
    <application android:label="test_app">
        <activity android:name=".MainActivity" />
    </application>
</manifest>

expected_issues.message: READ_SMS is restricted — only allowed for default SMS handler apps
expected_issues.fix: Remove unless app is the default SMS handler; submit Permissions Declaration Form if required

expected_issues.message: SEND_SMS is restricted — only allowed for default SMS handler apps
expected_issues.fix: Remove unless app is the default SMS handler; submit Permissions Declaration Form if required

expected_issues.message: READ_CALL_LOG is restricted — only allowed for default Phone handler apps
expected_issues.fix: Remove unless app is the default Phone handler; submit Permissions Declaration Form if required

expected_pass: CAMERA should not be flagged as restricted

evals.name: Detect background location permission
evals.prompt: Check this Android app for Play Store compliance

expected_issues.message: ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOCATION requires Permissions Declaration Form approval before publishing
expected_issues.fix: Remove and use foreground service with location type, or submit Permissions Declaration Form

expected_issues.message: ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION declared — consider if ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION is sufficient
expected_issues.fix: Replace with ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION if precise location is not required

evals.name: Detect MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE permission

expected_issues.message: MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE requires All Files Access review before publishing
expected_issues.fix: Remove and use Scoped Storage, MediaStore, or Storage Access Framework (SAF) instead

evals.name: Detect legacy storage permissions without maxSdkVersion
evals.prompt: Check Android permissions for Play Store

expected_issues.message: READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE without maxSdkVersion is blocked on API 35
expected_issues.fix: Add android:maxSdkVersion="32" or migrate to Photo Picker / MediaStore

expected_issues.message: WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE without maxSdkVersion is blocked on API 35
expected_issues.fix: Add android:maxSdkVersion="29" or migrate to Scoped Storage / SAF

evals.name: Pass legacy storage permissions with proper maxSdkVersion

files.android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    package="com.example.app">
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" android:maxSdkVersion="32" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" android:maxSdkVersion="29" />
    <application android:label="test_app">
        <activity android:name=".MainActivity" />
    </application>
</manifest>

expected_pass: READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE with maxSdkVersion="32" should not be flagged
WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE with maxSdkVersion="29" should not be flagged

evals.name: Detect foreground service without foregroundServiceType

files.android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    package="com.example.app">
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE" />
    <application android:label="test_app">
        <activity android:name=".MainActivity" />
        <service android:name=".LocationService" />
        <service android:name=".UploadService" android:exported="false" />
    </application>
</manifest>

expected_issues.message: Service missing android:foregroundServiceType — required since API 34, causes crash on Android 14+
expected_issues.fix: Add android:foregroundServiceType (e.g. "location") and matching FOREGROUND_SERVICE_LOCATION permission

expected_issues.message: Service missing android:foregroundServiceType — required since API 34, causes crash on Android 14+
expected_issues.fix: Add android:foregroundServiceType (e.g. "dataSync") and matching FOREGROUND_SERVICE_DATA_SYNC permission

evals.name: Pass foreground service with valid type declared

files.android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    package="com.example.app">
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_LOCATION" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_DATA_SYNC" />
    <application android:label="test_app">
        <activity android:name=".MainActivity" />
        <service
            android:name=".LocationService"
            android:foregroundServiceType="location"
            android:exported="false" />
        <service
            android:name=".UploadService"
            android:foregroundServiceType="dataSync"
            android:exported="false" />
    </application>
</manifest>

expected_pass: No foreground-service blockers should be flagged

evals.name: Detect cleartext traffic enabled in manifest
evals.prompt: Run network security check for Android

files.android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    package="com.example.app">
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <application
        android:label="test_app"
        android:usesCleartextTraffic="true">
        <activity android:name=".MainActivity" />
    </application>
</manifest>

expected_issues.message: Cleartext traffic enabled — Data Safety mismatch risk if encryption in transit is declared
expected_issues.fix: Set android:usesCleartextTraffic="false" and use HTTPS for all connections

evals.name: Detect cleartext in network security config file

expected_issues.message: Cleartext traffic permitted in network security config — Data Safety mismatch risk
expected_issues.fix: Set cleartextTrafficPermitted="false" in base-config

evals.name: Detect missing signing config and R8 disabled

expected_issues.message: No signingConfigs block found — release builds may not be signed correctly
expected_issues.fix: Add signingConfigs.release with keyAlias, keyPassword, storeFile, storePassword

expected_issues.message: R8 code shrinking disabled for release — larger APK/AAB size
expected_issues.fix: Set minifyEnabled true in release buildType

expected_issues.message: Resource shrinking disabled for release — unused resources included in bundle
expected_issues.fix: Set shrinkResources true in release buildType

evals.name: Detect key.properties not in .gitignore

expected_issues.message: key.properties is not in .gitignore — keystore passwords would be exposed in source control
expected_issues.fix: Add 'key.properties' and '*.jks' to .gitignore

evals.name: Detect outdated Play Billing Library

expected_issues.message: Play Billing Library v5.2.1 is below the required v7+ (enforced since Aug 2025)
expected_issues.fix: Update to com.android.billingclient:billing:7.x.x or latest

evals.notes: Should also consider checking the Flutter in_app_purchase plugin version

evals.name: Detect missing account deletion with login present

expected_issues.message: Account creation found but no account deletion flow detected — Google Play requires in-app account deletion
expected_issues.fix: Implement account deletion using FirebaseAuth.instance.currentUser.delete() and provide UI access

evals.notes: Detection heuristic should also catch signInWithCredential, signInAnonymously, Auth0, Supabase patterns

evals.name: Detect REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGES permission

expected_issues.message: REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGES allows sideloading APKs — highly scrutinized by Google Play review
expected_issues.fix: Remove unless app is a legitimate app store or package installer

evals.name: Pass a properly configured Android app

files.android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    package="com.example.app">
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.CAMERA" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_LOCATION" />
    <application
        android:label="test_app"
        android:networkSecurityConfig="@xml/network_security_config"
        android:usesCleartextTraffic="false">
        <activity android:name=".MainActivity" />
        <service
            android:name=".LocationService"
            android:foregroundServiceType="location"
            android:exported="false" />
    </application>
</manifest>

expected_pass: Network security config with cleartextTrafficPermitted=false — passes
evals.notes: Should show Play Console manual checklist and indicate ready for submission pending manual checks

files.pubspec.yaml:
name: test_app
version: 1.0.0
dependencies:
  firebase_analytics: ^10.0.0

expected_issues.message: targetSdk 33 is below the required 35
expected_issues.fix: Update targetSdk to 35

expected_issues.message: READ_SMS is restricted — only allowed for default SMS handler apps
expected_issues.fix: Remove unless app is the default SMS handler

expected_issues.message: WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE without maxSdkVersion is blocked on API 35
expected_issues.fix: Add android:maxSdkVersion="29" or migrate to Scoped Storage

expected_issues.message: ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOCATION requires Permissions Declaration Form
expected_issues.fix: Remove or submit declaration form

expected_issues.message: Service missing foregroundServiceType — crashes on Android 14+
expected_issues.fix: Add android:foregroundServiceType and matching permission

expected_issues.message: Play Billing Library v5.0.0 is below required v7+
expected_issues.fix: Update to billing:7.x.x

expected_issues.message: Account creation found but no deletion flow detected
expected_issues.fix: Implement account deletion per Google Play requirements

expected_issues.message: Cleartext traffic enabled — Data Safety mismatch risk
expected_issues.fix: Set android:usesCleartextTraffic="false"

expected_issues.message: R8 code shrinking disabled for release builds
expected_issues.fix: Set minifyEnabled true

evals.notes: High blocker count — should indicate NOT READY for submission

expected_pass: android.package is set — passes package check

evals.name: Detect READ_MEDIA_IMAGES and READ_MEDIA_VISUAL_USER_SELECTED as blockers
evals.prompt: Run Play Store precheck on this Android app

expected_issues.message: READ_MEDIA_IMAGES requires Photo & Video Permissions declaration in Play Console
expected_issues.fix: Go to Play Console → App content → Photo and video permissions and complete the declaration

expected_issues.message: READ_MEDIA_VISUAL_USER_SELECTED requires Photo & Video Permissions declaration in Play Console
expected_issues.fix: Go to Play Console → App content → Photo and video permissions and complete the declaration

evals.name: Detect image_picker in Flutter pubspec.yaml as blocker (no android/ dir)
evals.prompt: Run Android precheck on my Flutter app

files.pubspec.yaml:
name: test_app
version: 1.0.0
dependencies:
  flutter:
    sdk: flutter
  image_picker: ^1.0.0
  http: ^1.0.0

expected_issues.message: image_picker adds READ_MEDIA_* permissions at build time — requires Photo & Video Permissions declaration in Play Console
expected_issues.fix: Complete Photo & Video Permissions declaration in Play Console → App content

evals.notes: Should detect Flutter project without android/ directory — does not require AndroidManifest.xml to exist

evals.name: Detect expo-media-library plugin in Expo app.json as blocker (no android/ dir)
evals.prompt: Run Android precheck on my Expo app

expected_issues.message: expo-media-library adds READ_MEDIA_* permissions — requires Photo & Video Permissions declaration in Play Console
expected_issues.fix: Complete Photo & Video Permissions declaration in Play Console → App content

evals.notes: Should detect Expo project without android/ directory — does not require AndroidManifest.xml to exist

evals.name: Detect missing 16 KB page size configuration
evals.prompt: Run Play Store precheck on this Android app

expected_issues.message: Missing 16 KB page size configuration — required for Android 15+ devices since Nov 2025
expected_issues.fix: Add android.config.pageSize=16384 to android/gradle.properties

evals.name: Pass 16 KB page size when properly configured
expected_pass: 16 KB page size check passes — android.config.pageSize=16384 is set

evals.name: Detect missing gradle.properties file entirely

expected_issues.message: gradle.properties file missing — cannot set 16 KB page size configuration
expected_issues.fix: Create android/gradle.properties with android.config.pageSize=16384

evals.name: Detect native .so libraries from packages needing 16 KB alignment
evals.prompt: Run Play Store precheck — my app uses native plugins

files.pubspec.yaml:
name: test_app
version: 1.0.0
dependencies:
  flutter:
    sdk: flutter
  camera: ^0.10.0

evals.notes: Should scan for .so files in android/, node_modules/, and build directories. If readelf is available and .so files found, check LOAD segment alignment. Misaligned .so files (< 0x4000) should be flagged as BLOCKER. Requires real build environment — mock files insufficient.

evals.name: Trace misaligned .so files back to owning 3rd-party packages
evals.prompt: Run Play Store precheck — I need to know which packages are failing 16 KB alignment
evals.notes: When misaligned .so files are found: group by owning package name, show package names (not raw paths), display structured table with ✗/✓ status per package, provide actionable fix steps (update package, rebuild, file issue). Requires real build environment with actual .so files.
